metadata.description: Not Another Code Reviewer — a 5-stage corporate review pipeline plugin: a Profiler casts an adaptive committee from a 23-persona library; peers review at the code level, departments hunt for gaps, leadership grades aim alignment, and the Aggregator synthesizes a holistic verdict via Opus reasoning.

plugins.name: crucible
plugins.description: Run a project through a 5-stage corporate review pipeline. The Profiler reads the project, interviews you for aims, and casts a 4–8 persona review committee from a 23-persona library. Peers review at the code level, departments hunt for gaps, leadership grades aim alignment, and the Aggregator synthesizes a final score and verdict.
